B.name: Avocado Toast
steps: Toast 2 slices of sourdough until golden and crisp.
Halve avocado, scoop flesh into bowl. Mash with fork, add lemon juice, olive oil, salt and pepper.
Spread generously on toast. Top with chilli flakes.
Optional: add a fried or poached egg on top.
B.tip: Everything bagel seasoning on top is a game changer.

L.name: Greek Salad with Chickpeas
steps: Drain and rinse chickpeas well.
Dice cucumber, quarter cherry tomatoes, thinly slice red onion.
Combine chickpeas, cucumber, tomatoes, olives and onion.
Whisk olive oil, lemon juice, oregano, salt and pepper for dressing.
Toss everything, crumble feta on top.
L.tip: Marinate red onion in lemon juice 10 min 脙垄脗聙脗聰 removes the raw sharpness.

D.name: Mediterranean Grain Bowl
steps: Cook quinoa and let cool slightly.
Roast chickpeas with olive oil, cumin and paprika at 200脙聜脗掳C for 20 min.
Dice cucumber, halve tomatoes, chop parsley.
Assemble: quinoa base topped with all vegetables, chickpeas and crumbled feta.
Drizzle with olive oil and lemon juice. Spoon hummus on the side.
D.tip: Warm pita bread on the side makes this more filling.

B.name: Besan Chilla
steps: Mix besan with turmeric, cumin, ajwain, salt and enough water to make a smooth, pourable batter 脙垄脗聙脗聰 like pancake batter.
Add finely chopped onion, tomato, green chilli and grated ginger. Mix well.
Heat a flat non-stick pan on medium. Brush lightly with oil.
Pour one ladle of batter, spread in a circle. Drizzle oil around edges.
Cook 3 min until edges lift and bottom is golden. Flip and cook 2 min more. Serve with curd.
B.tip: The batter should be smooth 脙垄脗聙脗聰 no lumps. Add water slowly and whisk well. Rest the batter 5 min for better chillas.

L.name: Chana Masala
steps: Cook chickpeas until tender (canned works 脙垄脗聙脗聰 drain well).
Blend onion, tomatoes, ginger and garlic to smooth paste.
Heat oil, add cumin seeds. Add paste, cook until oil separates ~8 min.
Add spices, cook 2 min. Add chickpeas + 1 cup water, simmer 10 min.
Finish with garam masala and amchur.
L.tip: A tea bag while boiling dried chickpeas gives rich dark colour.

D.name: Spinach & Feta Frittata
steps: Preheat grill to high. Heat olive oil in an oven-safe pan (no plastic handle).
Saut脙聝脗漏 onion and capsicum 3 min. Add garlic, cook 30 sec. Add spinach until wilted.
Beat 6 eggs with salt and pepper. Pour over vegetables in the pan.
Cook on medium heat without stirring for 3 min until bottom is set.
Dot cherry tomatoes and crumble feta on top. Grill 3脙垄脗聙脗聯4 min until top is golden and set. Rest 2 min before slicing.
D.tip: A frittata is great cold the next day 脙垄脗聙脗聰 make it for dinner and take a slice to work for lunch.

B.name: Bread Upma
steps: Tear bread into rough 2cm pieces. No need to remove crusts.
Heat oil in a pan. Add mustard seeds, peanuts and curry leaves 脙垄脗聙脗聰 cook until seeds pop and peanuts are golden.
Add onion and green chilli. Cook 3 min until onion is soft.
Add chopped tomato and turmeric. Cook 2 min until tomato softens.
Add bread pieces, toss well to coat in masala. Season with salt. Cook 2 min on medium heat. Squeeze lemon juice and garnish with coriander.
B.tip: Use slightly stale bread 脙垄脗聙脗聰 it holds up better and does not turn mushy when tossed with the masala.

L.name: Dal Tadka
steps: Pressure cook toor dal with turmeric and salt until mushy. Mash and adjust.
Heat ghee 脙垄脗聙脗聰 add cumin, asafoetida, red chillies 脙垄脗聙脗聰 sizzle 30 sec.
Add garlic golden, then onion golden, then tomato soft.
Pour tadka over dal, stir, simmer 5 min.
Garnish with coriander. Serve with rice or roti.
L.tip: Use real ghee for the tadka 脙垄脗聙脗聰 the flavour difference is dramatic.

D.name: Dal Fry with Jeera Rice
steps: Pressure cook both dals with turmeric and salt until completely soft. Whisk smooth.
Heat ghee in a separate pan. Add cumin seeds, dried red chillies, asafoetida 脙垄脗聙脗聰 sizzle 20 seconds.
Add very finely chopped onion, cook 5 min until golden. Add ginger, garlic, cook 2 min.
Add diced tomato, cook until oil separates. Pour this tarka into the dal.
For jeera rice: heat ghee, add cumin, add soaked basmati, cook 12 min on low with 1.5x water covered.
D.tip: Dal fry should be thicker and richer than dal tadka 脙垄脗聙脗聰 use less water and let it reduce more.

B.name: Masala Moong Sprouts
steps: If using raw sprouts, microwave with 2 tbsp water for 90 seconds until just tender but still with bite.
Finely chop onion, tomato, cucumber and green chilli.
Mix sprouts with chopped vegetables in a bowl.
Add grated ginger, lemon juice, chaat masala and salt. Toss well.
Garnish with fresh coriander. Eat immediately or refrigerate up to 4 hours.
B.tip: Sprouts can be pre-germinated over 2 days from moong dal 脙垄脗聙脗聰 soak overnight, drain, rinse twice daily. Or buy ready sprouts from the supermarket.

L.name: Palak Paneer
steps: Blanch spinach 1 min, ice-water shock, blend smooth.
Saut脙聝脗漏 onion, garlic, ginger golden. Add tomato, cook soft. Blend smooth.
Return blended mix to pan. Add spinach puree, simmer 5 min.
Add pan-fried paneer cubes. Cook 3 min.
Swirl in cream. Serve with roti.
L.tip: Ice water after blanching keeps spinach vibrant green.

D.name: Roasted Cauliflower Steak
steps: Preheat oven to 220脙聜脗掳C. Slice cauliflower into 2cm thick steaks from the centre.
Brush both sides generously with olive oil mixed with smoked paprika, cumin, garlic powder and salt.
Roast on a tray 20 min, flipping halfway. Should be deeply golden at the edges.
Toss chickpeas in same spices, add to tray for last 10 min until crispy.
Serve cauliflower steak on tahini sauce, topped with crispy chickpeas, parsley and pomegranate seeds.
D.tip: Cut through the core 脙垄脗聙脗聰 it holds the steak together. Outer florets will fall apart and can be roasted separately.

B.name: Overnight Oats
steps: Add 脙聜脗陆 cup oats to a jar.
Pour over 脙聜脗戮 cup milk, add 2 tbsp Greek yogurt and 1 tbsp chia seeds.
Drizzle with honey. Stir well. Seal and refrigerate overnight.
Top with fresh berries and banana slices before eating.
B.tip: Prep 5 jars on Sunday 脙垄脗聙脗聰 breakfast sorted all week.

L.name: Chole with Jeera Rice
steps: Use canned or pre-cooked chickpeas. Saut脙聝脗漏 onion until golden. Add ginger, garlic, cook 2 min.
Add blended tomato and chole masala. Cook until oil separates 脙垄脗聙脗聰 about 4 min.
Add chickpeas with 脙聜脗录 cup water. Simmer 10 min until thick and saucy.
For jeera rice: heat ghee, add cumin seeds, add soaked basmati rice, cook 12 min covered on lowest heat.
Serve chole over jeera rice with coriander, lemon and sliced onion.
L.tip: Canned chickpeas work perfectly here 脙垄脗聙脗聰 saves 45 minutes without compromising taste. Drain and rinse well.

D.name: Cheesy Veggie Pasta Bake
steps: Cook pasta until 2 min before al dente 脙垄脗聙脗聰 it will finish in the oven.
Saut脙聝脗漏 onion, garlic, mushrooms and capsicum in olive oil until soft. Add spinach until wilted.
Add crushed tomatoes and Italian herbs. Simmer 5 min.
Toss pasta with sauce in a baking dish. Top generously with mozzarella and parmesan.
Bake 200脙聜脗掳C for 15 min until cheese is golden and bubbling. Rest 5 min before serving.
D.tip: Undercook the pasta 脙垄脗聙脗聰 it keeps cooking in the oven and absorbs sauce. Overcooked pasta bake is mushy.

B.name: Masala Dosa
steps: For filling: boil and roughly mash potatoes. Heat oil, add mustard seeds and curry leaves. Saut脙聝脗漏 onion, green chilli, ginger until soft. Add turmeric, mix in potatoes. Garnish with coriander.
Heat a flat tawa until very hot. Splash a little water 脙垄脗聙脗聰 it should sizzle away.
Pour one ladle of dosa batter. Spread immediately in concentric circles into a thin disc.
Drizzle oil around the edges. Cook until the edges lift and the dosa is golden and crispy.
Place potato filling on one half, fold and serve immediately with coconut chutney and sambar.
B.tip: The tawa must be very hot and well-seasoned. A cold tawa gives thick, soft dosas instead of crispy ones.

L.name: Pulihora
steps: Soak tamarind in warm water, extract thick pulp. Heat in a pan with turmeric and salt until it thickens 脙垄脗聙脗聰 about 5 min.
Heat oil until smoking hot. Add mustard seeds, dried red chillies, curry leaves, asafoetida 脙垄脗聙脗聰 sizzle vigorously.
Add peanuts and fry until golden. Add green chilli.
Pour the entire tempering over the tamarind paste. Mix well 脙垄脗聙脗聰 this is the pulikaarapu.
Add cooked and cooled rice. Mix gently but thoroughly. Taste and adjust salt and tamarind. Garnish with sesame seeds.
L.tip: The rice must be completely cool before mixing 脙垄脗聙脗聰 hot rice turns mushy. Make pulikaarapu ahead and mix rice just before eating.

D.name: Matar Paneer
steps: Blend onion, tomato, ginger and garlic to smooth paste.
Heat oil, add cumin. Add paste, cook until oil separates ~7 min.
Add spices. Cook 2 min. Add peas + 脙聜脗陆 cup water. Cover 5 min.
Add paneer cubes. Simmer 4 min.
Garnish with coriander. Serve with roti.
D.tip: Golden-fry paneer cubes first for better texture and colour.

B.name: Chole Bhature
steps: Pressure cook soaked chickpeas until very soft 脙垄脗聙脗聰 4 whistles. Reserve cooking liquid.
For chole: make a thick masala with blended onion, tomato, ginger, garlic. Cook until oil separates. Add chole masala, amchur, chickpeas. Simmer 15 min until thick.
For bhature: mix flour, curd, baking soda, salt and oil. Knead into soft dough. Rest 30 min.
Roll bhature slightly thicker than roti. Deep fry in hot oil until puffed and golden 脙垄脗聙脗聰 about 90 seconds each.
Serve immediately 脙垄脗聙脗聰 bhature deflate quickly.
B.tip: Bhature must be served the instant they come out of the oil. They are best eaten within 2 minutes.

L.name: Pesara Pappu with Rice
steps: Wash moong dal. Pressure cook with turmeric and salt 脙垄脗聙脗聰 2 whistles. It should be soft and slightly mashable.
Heat ghee in a pan. Add mustard seeds, curry leaves. Add finely chopped onion, cook 3 min.
Add ginger, green chilli, tomato. Cook until tomato is soft 脙垄脗聙脗聰 about 3 min.
Add cooked moong dal. Mix well. Simmer 5 min. Adjust consistency 脙垄脗聙脗聰 should be slightly thick.
Garnish with fresh coriander. Serve hot with steamed rice, papad and mango pickle.
L.tip: Moong dal cooks quickly 脙垄脗聙脗聰 do not overcook or it loses texture. It should hold shape but be completely tender.

D.name: Paneer Stuffed Paratha
steps: Knead soft wheat dough with water and salt. Rest 10 min.
Mix grated paneer with green chilli, ginger, cumin, coriander, red chilli, salt 脙垄脗聙脗聰 keep dry.
Roll dough disc, add filling in centre, seal edges, roll gently into paratha.
Cook on hot tawa, apply ghee both sides until golden spots appear ~4 min.
Serve with curd and pickle.
D.tip: Grate paneer fine 脙垄脗聙脗聰 coarse filling tears the dough when rolling.

B.name: Rava Upma

diced capsicum and onion in oil until soft. Add black beans and corn.
Season with cumin, smoked paprika, salt and pepper. Cook 2 min more.
Lay tortilla flat. Add cheese on one half, then vegetable mix, then more cheese.
Fold in half. Press in a dry pan on medium ~2 min each side until golden.

steps: Soak whole moong dal overnight. Drain well.
Blend soaked moong with ginger, green chilli, cumin and a little rice to a smooth, pourable batter. Season with salt.

sizzle 20 seconds.
Add very finely chopped onion, cook 5 min until golden. Add ginger, garlic, cook 2 min.
Add diced tomato, cook until oil separates. Pour this tarka into the dal.
For jeera rice: heat ghee, add cumin, add soaked basmati, cook 12 min on low with 1.5x water covered.
D.tip: Dal fry should be thicker and richer than dal tadka steps: Drain and rinse chickpeas. Toss with cumin, smoked paprika, garlic powder, salt and olive oil.
Pan-fry chickpeas on high heat 5 min, stirring occasionally, until slightly crispy.
Mix tahini with lemon juice and a splash of water to make a drizzleable sauce.
Warm tortilla. Layer spinach, diced cucumber, tomato, spiced chickpeas.
Drizzle tahini sauce and a spoon of yogurt. Roll tightly.

steps: Press tofu 10 min, cube. Pan-fry in hot oil until golden on most sides ~6 min.
Cook rice per packet. Prep all vegetables into bite-sized pieces.
In same hot pan, stir fry broccoli and carrot 3 min, then capsicum 2 min more.
Add ginger and garlic, toss 30 sec. Return tofu to pan.
Add soy sauce and sesame oil. Toss well. Serve over rice topped with sesame seeds.
D.tip: High heat, fast cooking In a bowl, whisk thick curd with a pinch of sugar and salt until smooth.
Add drained poha to the curd. Mix gently.
Add finely grated ginger and chopped green chilli. Stir to combine.

steps: Boil soya chunks 5 min in salted water, squeeze completely dry.
Fry onion golden, add ginger and garlic, cook 2 min.
Add tomatoes, red chilli and cumin. Cook until mashy.
Stir in beaten curd slowly. Add soya + 1 cup water, simmer 10 min.
Finish with garam masala and coriander.
L.tip: Squeezing soya dry removes raw smell and helps masala penetrate.

steps: Boil pasta in salted water until al dente. Reserve pasta water.

steps: Pour muesli into a bowl.
Add milk or Greek yogurt to your preferred consistency.
Top with fresh berries, sliced banana and a drizzle of honey.

steps: Soak moong dal 2 hrs, blend with ginger and green chilli to smooth batter.
Add chopped onion, cumin, coriander and salt.

no soaking needed ~12 min.
Heat ghee, add cumin, then garlic until golden.
Add onion 4 min, then tomato and green chilli until soft.
Add chopped methi, cook 3 min until wilted.
Combine with dal, simmer 5 min. Serve with chapati.
D.tip: If methi is too bitter, sprinkle with salt, rest 10 min, squeeze out water.

no lumps allowed or they tear the dough.
Add finely chopped green chilli, ginger, cumin, coriander, amchur and salt to the mash. Mix well.
Knead soft wheat dough with water, salt and a little oil. Rest 10 min.
Roll dough disc, place 2 tbsp potato filling in centre, seal edges firmly. Roll gently into thick paratha.
Cook on hot tawa with generous ghee both sides until deep golden spots appear. Serve with cold curd and pickle.
B.tip: The potato filling must be completely dry and smooth. Any moisture makes it burst through the dough.

Squeeze lemon juice, stir gently, garnish with coriander. Serve alongside jeera rice.
D.tip: The tarka must be poured immediately over the dal while sizzling hot
